title: Full list view for "My Work" in app
excerpt: Hello.  Would it be possible to have the option to see a full list of “my work” items in the app?  Currently they are divided into dates “due today” etc.  On the website there is the option to see everything at once.  Th…

posts.author: garyfarmer (Gary Farmer)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. Would it be possible to have the option to see a full list of “my work” items in the app? Currently they are divided into dates “due today” etc. On the website there is the option to see everything at once. Thank you.
